fingerprint: validation:some structural acceptance criteria are prose-only unless the contract adds an explicit static check or unit test that gates them.
reason: Operator override: meaningful behavior is gated by tests (gitctx allow/deny matrix + GIT_OPTIONAL_LOCKS=0 assertion); the caller migration is verified by the existing scan/review_loop tests still passing and will be caught by the code-review stage if a raw exec.Command remains. A static import-lint for 'uses gitctx not raw exec' is out of scope for this slice.
